title: Cluster User Stories
description: What each persona needs and why — the outside view companion to the design's inside view. Assignment to briefs lives in the briefs' stories arrays. S-numbers are sequential across the cluster and never renumbered.

cluster.description: Cluster name, matching the directory under docs/design/

name.description: The actor type (AI Agent, Human Developer, Operator)

role.description: What this persona is doing in this context — the same actor appears multiple times with different roles

id.description: Sequential across the whole cluster, not per-persona

text.description: Standard format: 'As {persona}, I want {outcome} so that {value}.' The so-that clause is how reviewers judge whether the implementation serves the need. Outcome, not implementation; one need per story.
